title: Login com credenciais válidas redireciona para o dashboard
description: Garante que um usuário consegue autenticar e acessar o painel principal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Login com senha incorreta exibe erro e permanece no login
description: Garante que credenciais inválidas não autenticam e retornam erro de autenticação.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill fake.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an inline authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Cadastro cria conta e redireciona para o dashboard
description: Garante que o fluxo de cadastro conclui com sucesso e autentica o usuário.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill a new email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the remaining required registration fields with valid values
Submit the sign up form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Cadastro com email já utilizado exibe validação e não avança
description: Garante que o sistema bloqueia cadastro duplicado e mostra erro apropriado.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the remaining required registration fields with valid values
Submit the sign up form
Verify a validation error indicating the email is already in use is visible
Verify the user remains on the sign up page

title: Recuperação de senha envia link com email válido
description: Garante que o fluxo de recuperação confirma o envio do email de reset.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Submit the password reset request
Verify a success message indicating the reset email was sent is visible

title: Recuperação de senha com email inválido mostra erro e permanece na página
description: Garante validação de formato de email no fluxo de recuperação.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill invalid-email-format into the email field
Submit the password reset request
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the forgot password page

title: Dashboard carrega KPIs e gráficos para usuário autenticado
description: Garante que o painel exibe os principais indicadores e visualizações ao acessar autenticado.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the dashboard
Verify KPI cards are displayed
Verify charts are rendered

title: Acesso ao dashboard sem autenticação redireciona para login
description: Garante que rota protegida não é acessível sem sessão autenticada.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Encomendas: filtrar por hoje exibe lista filtrada
description: Garante que o filtro de encomendas por data funciona e atualiza a listagem.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open package management
Apply the filter for today's packages
Verify the package list is filtered to today's entries

title: Encomendas: alterar status de pendente para retirado atualiza o card
description: Garante que a mudança de status é aplicada e refletida na interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open package management
Open the details for a package from the list
Initiate changing the package status from pending to picked up
Confirm the status change
Verify the package status is shown as picked up on the package card

title: Encomendas: validação impede salvar nova encomenda com campo obrigatório vazio
description: Garante que o formulário valida campos obrigatórios e impede envio incompleto.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open package management
Start adding a new package
Fill only some optional fields and leave at least one required field empty
Submit the new package form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the new package was not added to the list

title: Pré-visualizar unidades parseadas ao importar XML
description: Garante que a seleção de um XML exibe uma prévia da lista de unidades antes de cadastrar.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage units
Click the option to import units via XML
Select a valid XML file from the device
Verify a parsed list preview of units is displayed

title: Validar e confirmar importação de XML com sucesso
description: Garante que um XML válido pode ser validado e importado, e que as novas unidades aparecem na lista.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage units
Click the option to import units via XML
Select a valid XML file from the device
Click the action to validate the imported list
Confirm the import
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the newly imported units appear in the units list

title: Bloquear importação ao selecionar XML malformado
description: Garante que erros de parse/validação são exibidos e a importação é impedida para XML inválido.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage units
Click the option to import units via XML
Select a malformed XML file from the device
Verify parse or validation errors are listed
Verify the import confirmation action is not available

title: Cancelar importação após visualizar prévia
description: Garante que o usuário consegue sair do fluxo de importação após ver a prévia sem cadastrar unidades.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage units
Click the option to import units via XML
Select a valid XML file from the device
Click the cancel action for the import flow
Verify the units list view is displayed
Verify no new units from the imported file are added to the list

title: Exigir seleção de arquivo antes de validar importação
description: Garante que não é possível validar a lista importada sem antes selecionar um arquivo XML.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage units
Click the option to import units via XML
Click the action to validate the imported list
Verify a file selection requirement error is visible
Verify the import confirmation action is not available

title: Abrir formulário de edição de empresa a partir de um card
description: Garante que ao clicar em editar em um card, o formulário de edição abre preenchido com os dados da empresa.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage providers
Find a provider card in the list
Click the edit icon on the provider card
Verify the provider edit form is displayed
Verify the edit form fields are populated with the selected provider data

title: Salvar alterações válidas e refletir no card da empresa
description: Garante que a edição de dados válidos é salva e que o card da empresa reflete as mudanças.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage providers
Click the edit icon on a provider card
Fill CT Provider Updated into the company name field
Submit the save action for the provider form
Verify the provider list shows a card with the updated company name CT Provider Updated

title: Impedir salvamento com dados inválidos no formulário de empresa
description: Garante que o formulário apresenta validações e não permite salvar quando há dados inválidos.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage providers
Click the edit icon on a provider card
Fill invalid into the email field
Submit the save action for the provider form
Verify validation errors are visible
Verify the user remains on the edit form

title: Persistir alterações após recarregar a lista de empresas
description: Garante que mudanças salvas permanecem visíveis após sair do formulário e voltar à lista.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to manage providers
Click the edit icon on a provider card
Fill CT Provider Persist into the company name field
Submit the save action for the provider form
Click the navigation option to go to the dashboard
Click the navigation option to manage providers
Verify the provider list shows a card with the company name CT Provider Persist

title: Validar carregamento da página de vistorias e acesso ao histórico
description: Garante que a página de vistorias carrega e exibe a lista/histórico de inspeções.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to view inspections
Verify the inspections list or history is displayed

title: Create a new booking and see it on the calendar
description: Verifies a user can create a booking and it appears in the calendar view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open agendamentos
Click the action to create a new booking
Fill the booking date field with a valid future date
Fill the booking time field with a valid available time
Fill the booking details field with TC001 Booking
Save the booking
Verify the new booking with details TC001 Booking is displayed on the calendar

title: Prevent creating a booking in an already booked time slot
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving a booking when the selected time slot conflicts with an existing booking.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open agendamentos
Click the action to create a new booking
Fill the booking date field with a valid future date
Fill the booking time field with a valid available time
Fill the booking details field with TC002 Seed Booking
Save the booking
Click the action to create a new booking
Fill the booking date field with the same date used for TC002 Seed Booking
Select the same time slot used for TC002 Seed Booking
Fill the booking details field with TC002 Conflicting Booking
Save the booking
Verify a scheduling conflict warning is visible
Verify the conflicting booking with details TC002 Conflicting Booking is not added to the calendar

title: Change an existing booking status to confirmed and see it updated
description: Verifies a user can update a booking status to confirmed and the calendar reflects the change.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open agendamentos
Click the action to create a new booking
Fill the booking date field with a valid future date
Fill the booking time field with a valid available time
Fill the booking details field with TC003 Booking
Save the booking
Click the booking with details TC003 Booking on the calendar
Change the booking status to confirmed
Save the booking changes
Verify the booking TC003 Booking shows status confirmed on the calendar

title: Agendamentos page loads and shows primary calendar content
description: Verifies the scheduling page loads and displays the main calendar/booking list content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open agendamentos
Verify the calendar or booking schedule view is displayed

title: Require mandatory fields before saving a new booking
description: Verifies the booking form enforces required fields and does not save when information is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open agendamentos
Click the action to create a new booking
Fill the booking details field with TC005 Missing Fields
Save the booking
Verify a form validation error is visible
Verify no booking with details TC005 Missing Fields is added to the calendar

title: Cancel creating a booking and ensure nothing is added
description: Verifies canceling out of the new booking flow does not create an entry on the calendar.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open agendamentos
Click the action to create a new booking
Fill the booking date field with a valid future date
Fill the booking time field with a valid available time
Fill the booking details field with TC006 Canceled Booking
Cancel the booking creation
Verify no booking with details TC006 Canceled Booking is displayed on the calendar
